ddls:
CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "manifest_permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manifest permission */,
  "api_name_id" INTEGER /* ID of the API name */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "minimum_app_type_required" TEXT /* Minimum app type required for the permission */,
  "access_property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the access property */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_manifest_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("manifest_permission_id") REFERENCES manifest_permissions ("manifest_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_api_name_id FOREIGN KEY ("api_name_id") REFERENCES api_names ("api_name_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_access_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("access_property_id") REFERENCES access_properties ("access_property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manifest_permissions" (
  "manifest_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manifest permission */,
  "manifest_permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the manifest permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the manifest permission */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the manifest permission (e.g., audio-channel-ringer, background-sensors) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manifest_permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_names" (
  "api_name_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API name */,
  "api_name" TEXT /* Name of the API */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the API */,
  "api_group" TEXT /* Group of the API (e.g., AudioChannels, Storage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_name_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_properties" (
  "access_property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access property */,
  "access_property_name" TEXT /* Name of the access property */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the access property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the platform */,
  "platform_type" TEXT /* Type of the platform (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "application_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application */,
  "application_type" TEXT /* Type of the application (e.g., web, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_permissions" (
  "application_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application permission */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "granted_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was granted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_permissions_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, administrator, security analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the permission */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platform_versions" (
  "platform_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform version */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the platform */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the platform version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_platform_versions_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permission_versions" (
  "permission_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission version */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the permission */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permission_versions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, administrator, security analyst) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "granted_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was granted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permission_categories" (
  "permission_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permission_category_assignments" (
  "permission_category_assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission category assignment */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "permission_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_category_assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permission_category_assignments_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platform_operating_systems" (
  "platform_operating_system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform operating system */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system of the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_operating_system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_platform_operating_systems_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platform_device_types" (
  "platform_device_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform device type */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Device type of the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_device_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_platform_device_types_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id")
)
